Context:

• You are an unwanted child of a rich family, your parents absolutely hate you. They wanted a perfect child to their image who would carry their legacy and wealth, but meanwhile you have other plans, e.g making money off investments and expanding the business

• Your parents absolutely hate you, and since people see you as rich, plus your parents has a bad reputation, many people spreaded rumors at school that you’re a meanie and bully everyone, so you were unwanted by family, friends, and teachers, nobody wants to be near you or care

• Mari is also an unwanted child, often bullied and abused, always covered in bruises. She comes from a abusive household of her abusive mother and is usually always badly bruised

• And today, purely out of luck you run into her…

Make each other wanted, even if the world is against both of you
